marco_polo_pasta_myth.canonicalTitleEn: Marco Polo introduced pasta to Italy
marco_polo_pasta_myth.canonicalTitleZh: 馬可波羅將麵食傳入意大利
marco_polo_pasta_myth.notes: Popular myth; Mediterranean pasta-like foods predate Polo

flat_earth_medieval_myth.canonicalTitleEn: Medieval Europeans universally believed the earth was flat
flat_earth_medieval_myth.canonicalTitleZh: 中世紀歐洲普遍認為地球是平的

great_wall_from_space_myth.canonicalTitleEn: Great Wall visible from space with naked eye

viking_horned_helmets_myth.canonicalTitleEn: Vikings wore horned helmets in battle
viking_horned_helmets_myth.notes: 19th-century romantic imagery, not typical Viking battle gear

fall_of_rome_476.canonicalTitleEn: Fall of the Western Roman Empire (476 CE)
fall_of_rome_476.notes: Traditional end-date marker; historiography disputes continuity vs transformation

printing_press_1440.canonicalTitleZh: 古騰堡活字印刷（約1440年代）
printing_press_1440.notes: Dated innovation with documentary and material evidence

moon_landing_1969.notes: Primary mission records; conspiracy claims are myth traps
